title: Crayfish Jerk Cakes
description: A Caribbean-inspired appetizer or snack, featuring crayfish in a spicy jerk seasoning. Perfect for a quick seafood fix.
instructions: 2. In a medium bowl, mix together the flour, jerk seasoning, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg and a pinch of salt and pepper.
4. Add the crumbly crackers, panko breadcrumbs, and chopped cilantro to the egg mixture. Mix well.
5. Add the flour mixture to the egg mixture and mix until just combined. Be careful not to overmix.
7. Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the mixture onto a plate or tray.
8. Shape each portion into a patty.
9. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
10. When the oil is hot, add the patties and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
11. Transfer the patties to a baking sheet and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
12. Serve hot with lime wedges on the side.
